🤔 About Me?

  • 🥲 An undergraduate student of Soochow University, majoring in Software Engineering.
  • 🤣 Have a keen interest in coding and reading.
  • 👍 Always glad to collaborate and learn something from others
  • 📫 Reach me at deelsilcon@gmail.com \ yhxue@stu.suda.edu.cn
  • 😊 Atitude: No lying flat & No involution

😈 About this blog

The world is a wonderful place, and the only way to reveal human characteristics is to communicate with people.
